reviews.review_description:
A disgrace to gorilla tag.

When I loaded into the game I was surprised to find it was exactly like Gorilla Tag just with mods.

That was the problem.

This game was an exact copy of the game we all know and love, and these thieves copied every single thing about it and made money.

I hope the developers learn their lesson and that this game is gone for good.

eviecoolbeans
I used to play this more then gtag rip supertag

It was so fun I play with a lot of people on the game
That why I have 5/5
Good

I love the game the mods me and my friend played it and he has the pipe control thing and he was going to use it but his battery died. He is in my school so if he gets on he’d make a video with the camera thing with the long arms, stem longs arms and the pipes on as well. The volcano is there but it doesn’t work because I don’t see any coal or whatever and the reason the computer is not working and doesn’t join codes and I found this out because the leaderboard says currently not in code public servers are full and I try to join a code and I look at the leader board the message is gone but is say player 4 times and there is no mute buttons and no report buttons, and the soda thing in basement doesn’t work I put the pill things and the water balloons and I put a lot of them and it didn’t do anything. You start with 51000 shiny rocks and they have all the current gorilla tag cosmetics and the spring or fall,christmas Zane halloween cosmetics they also have a tv thing that works wich is above where arcade would be and there is a Backrooms horror mode and a free flashlight too that only works in the Backrooms mode and there is a free bucket of gold cosmetic  and every time you join you do the tutorial and you have to change your name and for some reason when you read the rules it says don’t mod and you get in you get a mod menu with platforms,long arms ,stem long arms and speed boost and the code always says there is -2 people. Don’t worry if you think your banned or it’s a glitch it’s not, but it is a pretty good game install it!
